fan_nodes.move: you healed her

and stayed in bad faith
and left her again
and took it to the couch

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, she's reliant, you feel trapped, you withdraw, a NEW hurt (from the withdrawal), the friend brings news, be glad, apologize / go back

positions.move: the bond becomes a bad-faith role

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, she's reliant, you feel trapped, the bond becomes a bad-faith role, you refuse the role, you claim authenticity, clear-eyed, not glad, you leave, without apology

positions.move: she sees the healing as preparation
her want expands past the couple
you are bewildered — did nothing wrong
no apology available: no injury to apologize FOR

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, she finds her footing, she reads Friedan; discontent named, she sees the healing as preparation, her want expands past the couple, she leaves — outgrew the container, you are bewildered — did nothing wrong, no apology available: no injury to apologize FOR

positions.move: you glimpse your own shadow in her light
you withdraw to do your own work
she waits, wounded by the silence
you complete a turn of individuation
be glad — you can love without projecting
go back and apologize for the silent leaving

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, her wholeness returns, you glimpse your own shadow in her light, you withdraw to do your own work, she waits, wounded by the silence, you complete a turn of individuation, be glad — you can love without projecting, go back and apologize for the silent leaving

positions.move: she is wounded — you had been the safe one
NOW you are the one who hurt her
be glad — repair is still possible

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, she attaches securely, you mistake security for staleness, you flirt with distance, testing, she is wounded — you had been the safe one, NOW you are the one who hurt her, be glad — repair is still possible, apologize / go back

positions.move: she loves you BECAUSE you healed her
you sense the love is for the healer-role
you test: reveal an unhealed part of yourself
her love needed your health to survive
you stay, without apology — no longer the healer

world_lines.sentence: you healed her, she loves you BECAUSE you healed her, you sense the love is for the healer-role, you test: reveal an unhealed part of yourself, she recoils, quietly, her love needed your health to survive, sober, not glad, you stay, without apology — no longer the healer
